highlights.text: Nong Nooch Gardens & Damnoen Saduak floating market
Accessible temples & Chao Phraya dinner cruise

itinerary.title: Relax Thailand Senior Tour
itinerary.tagline: Bangkok • Pattaya • Pure Serenity & Cultural Wonders
itinerary.overview: Relax Thailand senior special — slow-paced exploration, Nong Nooch Botanical Gardens, accessible temples, floating market, and Chao Phraya dinner cruise.
itinerary.seo_title: TH-011 | Relax Thailand Senior Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05N/06D Thailand senior tour (TH-011): Nong Nooch Gardens, floating market, temples, and river cruise.

days.title: Arrival & Transit to Pattaya
days.description: Warm concierge reception at Suvarnabhumi. Low step-in luxury van to Pattaya accessible sea-view resort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport reception, highway transit to Pattaya
Overnight Stay: Pattaya (Premium Accessible Sea-View Resort)

days.title: Nong Nooch Botanical Gardens
days.description: Electric cart tour of Nong Nooch gardens. Traditional Thai cultural show. Relaxed Pattaya beach stroll.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Nong Nooch entry, electric cart tour, cultural show
Overnight Stay: Pattaya (Premium Accessible Sea-View Resort)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Garden Buffet Lunch

days.title: Pattaya to Bangkok Cultural Transit
days.description: Wat Traimit Golden Buddha and Wat Pho with accessible pathways. Check into riverside hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Wat Traimit, Wat Pho, city driving tour
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Ultra-Luxury Accessible Riverside Hotel)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Indian Comfort Lunch

days.title: Damnoen Saduak Floating Market
days.description: Private slow canal boat through floating market channels. Afternoon rest at hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Damnoen Saduak entry, private padded canal boat
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Ultra-Luxury Accessible Riverside Hotel)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Thai-Indian Fusion Lunch

days.title: ICONSIAM & Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise
days.description: ICONSIAM accessible shopping. Grand Pearl 5-star dinner cruise with priority boarding.
activities: Sightseeing Included: ICONSIAM, Grand Pearl River Cruise
Evening Experience: 5-star river dinner cruise with live music
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Ultra-Luxury Accessible Riverside Hotel)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Grand Cruise Dinner

days.title: Bangkok Departure
days.description: Final breakfast. Comfortable private transfer to Suvarnabhumi International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport departure transfer

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in senior-friendly accessible hotels across Pattaya and Bangkok
Low step-in private luxury van for all transfers
Nong Nooch Gardens with electric cart and Damnoen Saduak canal boat
Priority Chao Phraya dinner cruise boarding
International airfare and Thailand visa fees
Personal expenses and optional spa treatments
